summary: Iteration 86: Ticket Scanner & Validation feature fully tested. All backend endpoints (POST /api/orders/scan/validate, POST /api/orders/scan/check-in) working correctly. Frontend Scanner page loads with proper UI elements and integrates correctly with backend APIs.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test tickets ORD-MUS-0001 through ORD-MUS-0010
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticket Scanner feature fully implemented. Test tickets: ORD-MUS-0002 to ORD-MUS-0010 belong to Musango Bus Service (operator_id: 30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8). TRV-000001 belongs to different operator. Scanner page at /scanner requires operator/admin role.

test_results.test: Returns valid:true for operator's own confirmed ticket with full details
Returns valid:false with 'different operator' message for other operator's ticket
Returns valid:false with 'not found' message for non-existent ticket
Admin can validate any operator's ticket
Rejects non-confirmed ticket (completed status) with 400 error
Rejects different operator's ticket with 403 error

elements_verified.element: Valid ticket shows green card with customer, service, amount
Check-in button with data-testid='check-in-btn' for confirmed/paid tickets
After check-in shows blue 'Already Checked In' card with timestamp
Invalid ticket shows red card with error message
Different operator ticket shows 'belongs to different operator' message
Ticket Scanner link visible in sidebar for operators
